allies.rationale_text: Empathy helps user-experience-research-methods interpret what people say, do, feel, and avoid without flattening it into internal product language.
Systems-thinking helps user-experience-research-methods treat journeys and interactions as connected system behavior rather than isolated moments.
allies.source_quote: A user journey map, for instance, is a systems map.

antagonists.rationale_text: Confirmation-bias turns user-experience-research-methods into interview theater by using research to validate an answer that leadership already prefers.
antagonists.source_quote: when interview design seeks validation instead of discovery

structured_tensions.tension_text: User-experience-research-methods conflicts with confirmation-bias when interview design seeks validation instead of discovery.
structured_tensions.source_quote: user-experience-research-methods vs confirmation-bias: user-experience-research-methods conflicts with confirmation-bias when interview design seeks validation instead of discovery.

structured_tensions.tension_text: User-experience-research-methods conflicts with authority-bias when stakeholder rank outweighs user evidence.
structured_tensions.source_quote: user-experience-research-methods vs authority-bias: user-experience-research-methods conflicts with authority-bias when stakeholder rank outweighs user evidence.

curation_notes.summary: The relation file keeps the raw source's cleanest current-vocabulary surface: empathy and systems as allies, plus the explicit anti-validation tension block.
donor_drops: Did not widen toward broader design-ops relations because the explicit current-vocabulary tensions already give this model a disciplined first-order surface.
open_questions: Storytelling is a source-real ally for communicating research, but empathy and systems-thinking were the stronger bounded anchors.
